title: Toasted Coconut Fried Rice
summary: Not your average fried rice. Packed with greens and flavour, the base of it is a toasted coconut milk which makes absolutely everything better.

method.description: Pour the coconut milk into a frying pan and place onto medium-high heat. Cook the coconut milk, stirring occasionally until the coconut splits and the solids are golden.

Meanwhile, trim and chop the Tenderstem stems into 1cm chunks, leaving the tops whole. Trim and thinly slice the chilli and spring onions, separating the greens from the whites. Grate the ginger and garlic.

Once the coconut milk has split, stir the spring onion whites, garlic and ginger through until fragrant. Stir fry the Tenderstem stems for 1-2 mins, then add a splash of water, the broccoli tops, and cover with a lid, to steam for 2-4 mins, until tender.
Stir the rice and soy sauce through, making sure to break up any clumps. Stir the spinach and ¾ of the remaining spring onions through until wilted. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
Share between bowls, top with the chilli and remaining spring onion.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
